title: findings.json — merged canonical gap list
description: Post-merge output of step 4 (gap dedup). Already JSON today; this schema formalizes the shape grader B1-B6 already enforces. Singleton — one findings.json per run.

fintech.description: True when the unit is in fintech/money-critical mode. Controls whether 03d/e and fintech-cross-cutting files are present.

critical.description: Legacy flag — true when fintech mode forces critical-mode artifacts. Grader B14 reads this.

merged_from.description: When this gap was merged from multiple per-type findings, lists the original ids.
